title: Observe the Moon
description: Nova guides you to sketch lunar craters with binoculars as a first step in observational astronomy.

dialogue.text: Nova here! Before we engineer spacecraft, it's helpful to study the skies. Find a safe spot away from traffic and bright lights, and let's observe the Moon together.
Set up a pair of binoculars or a small telescope to sketch prominent lunar craters. Never aim your optics at the Sun.
Nice work! Regular night-sky practice will sharpen your eye for plotting future rocket trajectories.
